acceptance_targets: [chapter_13_prose_001] Pass if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:189, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:325, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:337, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:351, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:463 no longer stack the same denial-first cadence across these climactic beats, and at least three of those moments now lead with concrete image/action/consequence rather than "It was not" or equivalent corrective framing. Fail if the chapter still repeats that same interpretive template across three or more of those highlighted moments.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:189, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:325, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:337, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:351, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:463 no longer stack the same denial-first cadence across these climactic beats, and at least three of those moments now lead with concrete image/action/consequence rather than "It was not" or equivalent corrective framing. Fail if the chapter still repeats that same interpretive template across three or more of those highlighted moments.
findings.problem: The prose keeps returning to the same denial-first correction scaffold at major beats ("It was not..." / evaluative reset, then the real label). Used this often in the same chapter, especially around the Thom Vesk confrontation and Lale's basin payoff, it starts to read like a house rhythm rather than fresh perception and slightly blunts moments that should land as singular shocks.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the highlighted beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:189, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:325, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:337, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:351, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:463 so at least several of them arrive through direct image, bodily sensation, or action consequence instead of a negation/correction setup. Keep Lale's analytic voice, but vary the sentence entry: let one beat open on the physical fact, another on social consequence, another on memory pressure, rather than repeatedly telling the reader first what the moment is not.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the collision of sanctity, lust, labor, rot, and family resentment. In edge cases, choose the more concrete, uncomfortable, and character-specific rendering over symbolic safety; if an image or action feels too polite for the pressure, it is probably wrong.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, violence, shame, grief, or economic pressure drives a scene, vague language counts as a failed beat; replace euphemism with the exact bodily, social, or material consequence the character experiences.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm across dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for ritual speech, emphasis, or deliberate character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and narrative movement aggressively: follow ordeal with meal, revelation with labor, schism with care, and public spectacle with close-bodied aftermath so no adjacent chapters share the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, bodily, locally sacred, and unsanitized; lyrical only when pressure earns it, never as a decorative default.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person rotating among the five siblings; each scene stays inside one consciousness and lets the river press through perception rather than omniscient explanation.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular propulsion with denser lyric accumulation; peak scenes should tighten and clarify rather than dissolve into fragmentary haze.
